title: The Silver Treasure
writer: Joseph Conrad, Robert N. Lee, Elizabeth Pickett
actors: George O'Brien, Jack Rollens, Helena D'Algy
plot: Nostromo is the foreman of longshoremen in a South American Republic, and they are to load the cargo of silver that is to come from the San Tome mine. Sotillo and his band gang are plotting to steal the silver, but the fore-warned...
